title: Claude Code T-Shirt Design - Workflow Diagram
description: Simple three-box workflow diagram showing the transformation from course description to 500-page textbook using Claude Code Skills, designed for custom t-shirt printing
subject: AI-Powered Education, Merchandise Design
creator: Claude AI with Mermaid Generator Skill
learningObjectives: Trace the three-node left-to-right flow in which a course description is transformed by Claude Code Skills and generates a 500-page textbook
Distinguish the input, process, and output roles of the three nodes and the color coding (turquoise, Anthropic brown, purple) that signals each role
Explain why a wearable diagram needs 20px bold type, 3px strokes, and only three nodes to stay legible at 10 to 12 inches on fabric
Design a variant color scheme that keeps input, process, and output distinguishable against a dark garment
Export the diagram as SVG rather than raster so the design stays sharp at any print size
